title: Department of Public Relations and Advertising - Message from the Head of the Department
content:
Department of Public Relations and Advertising - Message from the Head of the Department

In the Department of Public Relations and Advertising at Istanbul Esenyurt University, a rich curriculum is offered to our students in accordance with the 21st Century Information Society standards and within the scope of the international Bologna process. Our experienced, qualified and dynamic academic staff aims to educate our students within the scope of a wide range of theoretical and applied courses in the areas of public relations, advertising, new media, social media, communication, integrated marketing communication, human resources, entrepreneurship, psychology and business in order to maket hem gain competence and expertise in their fields. Our classrooms are small in size and our students are given education within the scope of theoretical lectures, applications, questions and answers, discussions, assignments and presentations. Our graduates have the opportunity to work in public relations agencies, advertising agencies, media planning agencies, social media agencies, or in companies  as  editors, event managers, copywriters, client managers, strategists, creative directors, media planners, corporate communication directors, human resources specialists or social media specialists. We offer our students the opportunity to develop themselves further through the organized seminars, certificate programs, and other social activities in our university. In addition to these, as Istanbul Esenyurt University, which is among the most entrepreneurial and innovative universities in Turkey, we prepare our students for the life after graduation by providing part-time career opportunities through private sector and public collaborations.

This content was updated on 09/09/2024.
